title: Dried Fruits Mod
description: This is a very simple mod that adds a few drying processes, fruits, trees, and dried fruits to the environment. Some more special fruits may give you effects.
body: This will add an assortment of dried fruits and vegetables, as well as a couple of tools to help you make them. The foods will be located in the surrounding environments and will be farmable through a myriad of methods. Eventually you will be able to create a food processing empire! But why dont we start with some simple dried fruit.
